titleStmt.title: SII 8.349: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 349. (A.R. No. 72 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaNmahāmaṇḍaliśvaraN AriIrāyavibhāṭaN bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarakaṇḍaN mūvarāyarakaṇḍaN kaṇḍanāṭukoṇḍu koṇḍanāṭukuṭātāNcatusamutrātipati śrīvirapradāpadevarāyamahārāyar pṛtuvirājyaM paṇṇiAruḷāniṉṟa śakābtaM 1000 3 100 5 10 2Nmel cellāniṉṟa savumiyat=tu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ēkhādaśiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattuṉāḷ naṭuviṉmaṇḍalattu IrājaIrājavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭināṭṭu centamaṅkalamuṭaiyār Āvattukkāttaruḷiya nayinār koyiṟ tāṉattāṟkum Ivvūrk grāmadevadaiyāṉa teṟkilvācalil tukkātevi koyiṟ tāṉattāṟkum kuṭutta Udakapūrvvatarmmaśāsanap paṭṭaiyam . nayiṉār Āvattukāttaruḷiya nayiṉār pūcai punaskāram Aṅkaraṅkapokam Amutupaṭikkum tirununtāviḷakku pattukkum paṅkunimātattile cataiya
nakṣat=trattile tirutterile Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruṉāḷukkum devarāyamahāraāyar tarmamāka kaṟasaṅvaṟsarattu Āṭimātam mutalukku vaḻutilampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭiyil kallaikuṟicci paṟṟil kallaikuṟicci Ūr Oṉṟukku melaipaṇṇai kiḻaipaṇṇai Uṭpaṭa kallaikuṟicci Ūr Oṉṟukku kuḷam poṉ 6 100 9 10 9 �kku savusti poṉ 5 100 4 10 Akṣara ttile Ūr Oṉṟukku kuḷam poṉ Aṟunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟuOṉpatu �kku savusti poṉ Aiññūṟṟu nāṟpatu Ippoṉṉukku Inta Ūr ṉāNkellai Uṭpaṭṭa teṉpāṟkellai puliŪr Ellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ceṅkuṟicci Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai pātūr centamaṅkalattil Ellaikku teṟku kaḷattūr Ellaikku meṟku Iṉṉāṉkellai Uṭpaṭa kallaikuṟicciyum tukkātevikku pūcai puṉaskāram tiruppaṇikku ceṅkoṇṭān
paṟṟil Ārūr Oṉṟu Āka Inta Iraṇṭu Ūrum nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nattaṅkaḷ nañcai puñcai vāNpayir puNpayir vilaiyācaiAṟuti vācalpaṇam veṭṭivari ErimīN ceṭṭuIṟai cekkukaṭamai paṭṭiteṇṭam kuṟṟateṇṭam taṟikaṭamai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai Oḻukkuniṟpāṭṭam kalāyam tirikaiāyam Āṭi kāttikaipaccai karuvipaṇam Ācupotumakkaḷperkaṭamai kāṇiāṭcipeṟu Aracupeṟu talaiĀrikkam kāvaṟkāṟarperil koḷḷum poṉvari paccaipaṇam Aricikāṇam naṟpacu nalerutu nalerumai naṟkiṭā Eṭuttaḷavu viruttupaṭi karaṇikkarcoṭi Avasaravattiṉai Irāyasavattaṉai Uṭpaṭṭa palavarikaḷum Uṭpaṭa cuṅka Upaiyamāṟkam Iṭaittuṟai ṉiṅkalāka neti nikṣepam cela pāṣāṇam Akṣaṇi Akāmi sitta sādhyayam Eṉkiṟa Aṣṭapokam tecasāsaṉaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭṭa sakala svarṇṇā
tāyaṅkaḷ sakala bhadhdhātāyaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭa Inta Ūrkaḷ tirunāmattukāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Āvattukkāttaruḷiya nayināṟkum tukkātevikkum Aṅkaraṅkapokam Amutupaṭi tirinuntāviḷakkum tirunāḷum tāḻpaṭāmal devarāyamahāraāyar tarmmamāka sarvvamānnvyamāka sarvvavātai parihāramāka cūcantiṟārkhkhastāyiyāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum . Inta tarmmattukku hāni paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ kaṅkaikaraiyiṟ kapilaipacuvaiyum mahaāprāmaṇaraiyum koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavanākavum vittarmmaM �������� . Ivai paNmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.349 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
